body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- pass 22 report (autonomous session, per your GO ON/continue-until-completion). Shipped WARRANT#35 -> SLS(50)/9.64: forge-indicate r2 (3F relationship measurement). Hooked real agreement/conflict/crossover counting into the EXISTING MeasureRegimeIC pass (not a new scan -- this matches the thesis own design). Also caught and fixed a WARRANT#34 naming bug along the way: component index 2 was mislabeled Volatility (its actually Volume) and index 3 mislabeled ATR (its actually Volatility) -- the index values used were already correct, only the labels/comments were wrong, zero behavior change. Compiled clean: 0 errors, 1 pre-existing warning. Identity invariant verified -- full diff reviewed line by line, every change is either a comment fix, a version banner, or a new statement that writes only to new globals and reads only already-computed local values, nothing existing altered. Continuing now to forge-edge-2 r2 (Phase 3D dwell and bracket) without further check-ins, per your instruction. Standing floor unchanged: no MetaTrader/Strategy Tester execution without your separate explicit per-run consent naming them -- will keep compiling and checkpointing, will stop and flag if anything actually needs a live run or hits a real failure.
